basic_details.job_title: UP Anganwadi Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for 292 Anganwadi Worker Posts in Farrukhabad District
basic_details.organization_name: Office of the District Programme Officer, Farrukhabad
basic_details.short_information: Farrukhabad Anganwadi Bharti 2026 has been officially announced by the Office of the District Programme Officer (Jila Karyakram Adhikari), Farrukhabad, inviting online applications for 292 Anganwadi Karyakatri (Anganwadi Worker) posts on an honorarium-based contract basis. The recruitment notice, issued on 29 June 2026, is being conducted as per the government order (Shasanadesh No. 01/2025/3313/58-1-2025(1917687)) dated 17 September 2025, issued by the Principal Secretary, Bal Vikas Seva evam Pushtahar, Uttar Pradesh, Lucknow. Eligible female candidates can apply online through the official d

application_fee.details: The official notification does not mention any application fee for the Anganwadi Karyakatri recruitment 2026. Candidates should verify fee details, if any, directly on the online application portal at upanganwadibharti.in at the time of filling the form.

age_limit.details: Minimum age: 18 years Maximum age: 35 years Age will be reckoned as on 1 January 2026. Candidates must not be below 18 years or above 35 years as on this date. Only the date of birth recorded in the High School marksheet/certificate will be considered valid for age calculation.

qualification.details: The minimum educational qualification for the Anganwadi Karyakatri post is Intermediate (12th pass) or an equivalent qualification. Merit for selection will be prepared on the basis of the percentage of marks obtained in the maximum qualifying educational qualification held by the candidate.

how_to_apply: Visit the official departmental website: upanganwadibharti.in
Locate and open the Farrukhabad district Anganwadi Karyakatri recruitment 2026 online application link.
Carefully read the project-wise and ward/village-wise vacancy and reservation details before proceeding.
Fill in the online application form with accurate personal, educational, and category details.
Upload self-attested, clear, and legible scanned copies of all required documents as specified in the form.
Review all entered facts, figures, marks, percentage, and date of birth carefully, as no correction opportunity will be given after submission.
Submit the application form on or before the last date, 20 July 2026.
Save/print the confirmation of your submitted application for future reference.
important_instructions: Any error in facts, figures, marks, percentage, or date of birth in the online application will lead to rejection of the application, and no opportunity for correction will be provided. The applicant will be solely responsible for such errors. Only residence and caste certificates issued online with digital signatures, where online verification is possible, will be considered valid. Only income certificates issued by a competent authority as per the specified UP Government order will be considered valid, where online verification is possible. Selection will be finalized as per the decision of the District Magistrate/Selection Committee and applicable government orders. The number of vacancies is subject to increase or decrease based on any court case, decision, or order, or as decided by the Selection Committee. The complete ward/village-wise vacancy and reservation list is available at the District Collectorate, Vikas Bhawan, Tehsil, and Vikas Khand offices, as well as on the official website.

content_sections.heading: UP Farrukhabad Anganwadi Karyakatri Recruitment 2026: Overview
Important Dates
content_sections.text: Note: The official notification does not mention a separate online application start date; candidates should check upanganwadibharti.in for the application portal status.

content_sections.heading: UP Farrukhabad Anganwadi Karyakatri Vacancy Details (Project-wise)
content_sections.text: The 292 Anganwadi Karyakatri vacancies are distributed across 8 Bal Vikas Pariyojanas (Child Development Projects) in Farrukhabad district, both urban and rural. The category-wise reservation break-up as per the official notice is given below. The complete Gram Sabha/ward-wise vacancy list along with detailed reservation and eligibility has been displayed at the District Collectorate, Vikas Bhawan, Tehsil, and Vikas Khand offices, and is also uploaded on the official website upanganwadibharti.in. Candidates are advised to check the ward/village-wise list before applying, as posts are filled based on residency of the specific Gram Sabha or ward.

content_sections.heading: Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: Only female candidates are eligible to apply for the Anganwadi Karyakatri posts. The candidate must be a resident of the same Gram Sabha/Ward (in urban areas) for which the vacancy is notified.

content_sections.heading: Educational Qualification
content_sections.text: The minimum educational qualification for the Anganwadi Karyakatri post is Intermediate (12th pass) or an equivalent qualification. Merit for selection will be prepared on the basis of the percentage of marks obtained in the maximum qualifying educational qualification held by the candidate.

content_sections.heading: Age Limit
content_sections.text: Minimum age: 18 years Maximum age: 35 years Age will be reckoned as on 1 January 2026 . Candidates must not be below 18 years or above 35 years as on this date. Only the date of birth recorded in the High School marksheet/certificate will be considered valid for age calculation.

content_sections.heading: Selection Preference Order
content_sections.text: As per the notification, selection preference for each Gram Sabha/Ward will be given in the following order: Widow / divorced / deserted women, who are original residents of the concerned Gram Sabha/Ward and belong to a family living below the poverty line (BPL), will get first priority. If no such widow/divorced/deserted BPL candidate is available in that Gram Sabha/Ward, then women from BPL families of the same Gram Sabha/Ward will be considered eligible. If no widow/divorced/deserted or BPL candidate is available, resident women of that Gram Sabha/Ward from families living above the poverty line will be considered eligible. Document requirement for priority categories: For widow candidates: A certificate issued by the Gram Panchayat Officer/concerned Nagar Nikay along with a certified copy of the family register (Parivar Panjika) will be considered valid. For divorced/deserted women: Only orders issued by the Hon'ble Court will be considered valid proof.

content_sections.heading: Honorarium / Pay Details
content_sections.text: The Anganwadi Karyakatri post is a honorarium-based contractual engagement (Manadey Aadharit Sanvida), not a regular salaried government post. The official notification does not specify the exact monthly honorarium amount. Candidates are advised to refer to the departmental government order dated 17 September 2025 or the official website upanganwadibharti.in for honorarium details.

content_sections.heading: Application Fee
content_sections.text: The official notification does not mention any application fee for the Anganwadi Karyakatri recruitment 2026. Candidates should verify fee details, if any, directly on the online application portal at upanganwadibharti.in at the time of filling the form.

content_sections.heading: Required Documents
content_sections.text: High School marksheet/certificate (for date of birth proof) Intermediate (12th) or equivalent marksheet/certificate Residence certificate (online digitally signed certificate only, where online verification is possible) Caste certificate (online digitally signed certificate only, where online verification is possible) Income certificate issued by a competent authority as per UP Government Revenue Section-09 order no. 3959/1-9-11-Ra0-9 dated 30 September 2011 (where online verification is possible) Family register (Parivar Panjika) certified copy, for widow candidates Court order, for divorced/deserted candidates Self-attested, clear, and legible scanned copies of all documents mentioned in the online form

content_sections.heading: How to Apply Online for Farrukhabad Anganwadi Karyakatri Bharti 2026
content_sections.text: Visit the official departmental website: upanganwadibharti.in Locate and open the Farrukhabad district Anganwadi Karyakatri recruitment 2026 online application link. Carefully read the project-wise and ward/village-wise vacancy and reservation details before proceeding. Fill in the online application form with accurate personal, educational, and category details. Upload self-attested, clear, and legible scanned copies of all required documents as specified in the form. Review all entered facts, figures, marks, percentage, and date of birth carefully, as no correction opportunity will be given after submission. Submit the application form on or before the last date, 20 July 2026 . Save/print the confirmation of your submitted application for future reference.

content_sections.heading: Important Instructions
content_sections.text: Any error in facts, figures, marks, percentage, or date of birth in the online application will lead to rejection of the application, and no opportunity for correction will be provided. The applicant will be solely responsible for such errors. Only residence and caste certificates issued online with digital signatures, where online verification is possible, will be considered valid. Only income certificates issued by a competent authority as per the specified UP Government order will be considered valid, where online verification is possible. Selection will be finalized as per the decision of the District Magistrate/Selection Committee and applicable government orders. The number of vacancies is subject to increase or decrease based on any court case, decision, or order, or as decided by the Selection Committee. The complete ward/village-wise vacancy and reservation list is available at the District Collectorate, Vikas Bhawan, Tehsil, and Vikas Khand offices, as well as on the official website.

faq.question: Q1. How many Anganwadi Karyakatri posts are vacant in Farrukhabad 2026 recruitment?
faq.answer: A total of 292 Anganwadi Karyakatri posts are vacant across 8 projects in Farrukhabad district, as per the official notification dated 29 June 2026.

faq.question: Q2. What is the last date to apply for Farrukhabad Anganwadi Bharti 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the online application is 20 July 2026.

faq.question: Q3. Who can apply for the Anganwadi Karyakatri post in Farrukhabad?
faq.answer: Only female candidates who are residents of the concerned Gram Sabha/Ward, aged between 18 and 35 years as on 1 January 2026, with a minimum qualification of Intermediate (12th pass), are eligible to apply.

faq.question: Q4. What is the educational qualification required for Anganwadi Karyakatri?
faq.answer: The minimum qualification is Intermediate (12th) or an equivalent qualification. Merit is prepared based on the percentage of marks in the highest qualifying education.

faq.question: Q5. What is the application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The official notification does not mention any application fee. Candidates should check the online application portal for the latest fee details, if applicable.

faq.question: Q6. Where can I check the ward-wise vacancy and reservation list?
faq.answer: The complete Gram Sabha/ward-wise vacancy and reservation list is available at the District Collectorate, Vikas Bhawan, Tehsil, and Vikas Khand offices in Farrukhabad, and also on upanganwadibharti.in.

faq.question: Q7. Is this a permanent government job?
faq.answer: No. The Anganwadi Karyakatri post is an honorarium-based contractual engagement, as stated in the official notification.
